_comment: Internal inventory snapshot for CASE-001 — Hamburg Precision Components GmbH. Simulates ERP/warehouse module output. Used by Context Engine for stockout risk calculation.
_note: inventory_coverage_days = current_stock_units / daily_consumption_units = 360 / 120 = 3 days. With predicted_delay_days = 14, production stops on day 3 and resumes only on vessel arrival. Risk window = 11 days.
